        // The number is populated by the platform's Number Maintenance
        // subsystem during the insert pipeline; on most platform releases
        // the number is already visible on the original GlideRecord by
        // the time insert() returns, but a fresh GlideRecord.get(sys_id)
        // is the documented defensive pattern that works across all
        // releases (Yokohama and later per AAP Section 0.6.1).
        //
        // The newSysId used here is the value returned by insert() in the
        // line above - it is NOT a hardcoded sys_id literal, so this
        // GlideRecord.get(newSysId) call complies with the AAP Section
        // 0.7.2 no-hardcoded-sys_id constraint.
        var savedGr = new GlideRecord('x_casemgmt_case');
        if (!savedGr.get(newSysId)) {
            gs.error('CasePortalService.submitCase: post-insert lookup failed for sys_id=' + newSysId);
            return { error: 'Submission failed.' };
        }

        // Return ONLY the auto-generated number - no other fields, no
        // sys_id, no audit fields. The portal confirmation widget
        // (../portal/widgets/sp_widget_x_casemgmt_case_confirmation_widget.xml)
        // displays this number to the requester so they can later look up
        // their case via the status page.
        return { number: String(savedGr.getValue('number')) };
    },

    /**
     * Anonymous case status lookup entry point.
     *
     * Whitelist-only field return per AAP Section 0.7.4:
     *   - Looks up by case number (CASE0000001 style; the public-facing
     *     identifier returned by submitCase).
     *   - Returns ONLY: status, subject, opened_date.
     *   - NEVER returns: assigned_group, assigned_agent, description,
     *     closed_date, requester_name, requester_email, priority, type,
     *     pending_reason, sys_id, sys_created_by, sys_created_on,
     *     sys_updated_by, sys_updated_on, or any other field. The
     *     three-field whitelist is the privacy perimeter for anonymous
     *     lookups - returning the full record would expose internal
     *     assignment data and PII that the requester themselves
     *     supplied at submission time.
     *   - Returns null when no case matches. The calling scripted REST
     *     endpoint translates null into the HTTP 404 not-found response
     *     whose verbatim body is specified in AAP Section 0.7.4. The
     *     user-facing not-found message is INTENTIONALLY absent from this
     *     Script Include's runtime path - it is the REST endpoint's
     *     responsibility to surface that message.
     *
     * Robust input handling per Rule 9 of the agent prompt: gracefully
     * handle empty strings, whitespace-only strings, and non-string
     * inputs without throwing.
     *
     * @param {String} number - case number (e.g., 'CASE0000001'). Any
     *     leading/trailing whitespace is stripped before query.
     * @return {Object|null} { status, subject, opened_date } when a case
     *     with the given number is found, or null when no case matches
     *     (including when the number argument is null, undefined, empty,
     *     non-string, or whitespace-only).
     */
    lookupCase: function(number) {
        // Defensive null/type check. The scripted REST endpoint passes
        // through whatever the caller supplied as the 'number' query
        // parameter; a missing parameter yields undefined, an empty
        // parameter yields '', and the platform may sometimes coerce
        // numeric-looking strings into numbers. All of these should
        // produce a clean "not found" response without throwing.
        if (number === null || number === undefined) {
            return null;
        }
        // Coerce to string defensively before calling .trim() - the
        // string primitive may be received as a Number or other type.
        var trimmed = String(number).trim();
        if (trimmed === '') {
            return null;
        }

        var caseGr = new GlideRecord('x_casemgmt_case');
        // Query by the public-facing 'number' field, NOT by sys_id. The
        // case number is the stable human-readable identifier shown to
        // the requester on the submission confirmation; it is the only
        // identifier the requester ever sees, so it is the only key the
        // lookup endpoint accepts. This compliance with the AAP Section
        // 0.7.2 no-hardcoded-sys_id constraint is also a privacy win:
        // anonymous callers cannot probe the system by guessing
        // 32-character hex sys_id values.
        caseGr.addQuery('number', trimmed);
        // setLimit(1) is a defensive optimization - the case number is
        // a unique field per the auto-numbering generator, so at most
        // one row can match. Setting the limit eliminates any potential
        // for a misconfiguration to return multiple rows and tells the
        // database engine to stop after the first hit.
        caseGr.setLimit(1);
        caseGr.query();

        if (!caseGr.next()) {
            // No case with the given number was found. Return null; the
            // caller (the scripted REST operation script) translates
            // null into the HTTP 404 response whose verbatim body is
            // specified in AAP Section 0.7.4. We deliberately do NOT
            // include that verbatim text in this Script Include - the
            // REST endpoint owns the user-facing message, and embedding
            // the literal here would create a maintenance hazard if the
            // message ever needed to be reworded (which would then
            // require a schema/Update-Set re-export rather than just a
            // REST endpoint update).
            return null;
        }

        // Whitelisted output fields per AAP Section 0.7.4. EXACTLY three
        // fields are exposed to anonymous lookup callers:
        //
        //   - status: lets the requester see if their case is still
        //     Draft, has progressed to Open / In Progress / Pending /
        //     Resolved, or has been Closed.
        //   - subject: lets the requester confirm they're looking up the
        //     correct case (the requester chose this string at
        //     submission time, so echoing it back confirms identity
        //     without exposing other-party content).
        //   - opened_date: lets the requester compute how long the case
        //     has been open. Note: opened_date is auto-set on insert
        //     by the before-insert business rule
        //     ../business_rules/x_casemgmt_set_opened_date.xml.
        //
        // The String() coercion normalizes the GlideElement primitive
        // values into plain strings (so JSON.stringify on the result
        // produces clean JSON without any GlideElement object metadata).
        // The `|| ''` defaults handle the rare edge case where a column
        // is unexpectedly null-valued at runtime (e.g., a partially-
        // initialized seed-data row); empty strings are safer than null
        // in JSON responses to widget code that may not handle null
        // gracefully.
        return {
            status:      String(caseGr.getValue('status') || ''),
            subject:     String(caseGr.getValue('subject') || ''),
            opened_date: String(caseGr.getValue('opened_date') || '')
        };
    },

    /**
     * Class-name marker. ServiceNow's Class.create() pattern conventionally
     * exposes a `type` property whose value matches the class name (without
     * the scope prefix). This is used by the platform's introspection
     * tooling and by some debug logging. It MUST be 'CasePortalService'
     * (NOT 'x_casemgmt_CasePortalService') - the scope prefix lives only in
     * the <api_name> element above, not in the class name itself.
     */
    type: 'CasePortalService'
};
]]></script>
        <sys_class_name>sys_script_include</sys_class_name>
        <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by>
        <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on>
        <sys_id>95e90fa18471e42875f5f956ec7949d1</sys_id>
        <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count>
        <sys_name>CasePortalService</sys_name>
        <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package>
        <sys_policy/>
        <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope>
        <sys_update_name>sys_script_include_x_casemgmt_CasePortalService</sys_update_name>
        <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by>
        <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on>
    </sys_script_include>
</record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Validate Open Transition
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_hub_flow"> <sys_hub_flow action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <access>public</access> <acls/> <active>true</active> <annotation/> <callable_by_client_api>false</callable_by_client_api> <category display_value="Custom">custom</category> <copied_from/> <copied_from_name/> <description>Subflow that validates the Draft -> Open transition on x_casemgmt_case. Per AAP Section 0.5.5, requires assigned_group to be populated. Calls x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToOpen(case_record), which reads case_record.getValue('assigned_group') and returns { ok: true } when populated or { ok: false, error: 'Required field assigned_group is empty.' } when null/empty/whitespace. On failure, throws the validator's error message via Flow Designer's Throw Error action which surfaces the message on the form via gs.addErrorMessage + setAbortAction (per AAP Section 0.7.1 "Surface all blocking errors on the form"). ServiceNow-native equivalent of ArkCase CaseFileQueueHandler (acm-plugins/acm-default-plugins/acm-case-file-plugin/src/main/java/com/armedia/acm/plugins/casefile/pipeline/presave/CaseFileQueueHandler.java) which set the queue and forced status=ACTIVE; the ServiceNow target separates concerns so the queue (assigned_group) is set by the caller and the status transition is GATED on its presence rather than auto-coupled. Defense-in-depth complement to ../../business_rules/x_casemgmt_block_draft_backtransition.xml (which handles the prohibited reverse direction Any -> Draft). Called by parent flows ../general_inquiry_state_machine.xml and ../complaint_state_machine.xml whenever a case status changes to 'Open'. Inputs: case_record (Reference to x_casemgmt_case, mandatory, $trigger.current). No outputs at subflow level. No role check. No side effect on success - unlike validate_pending_transition (sets pending_reason) or validate_closed_transition (sets closed_date), the Open transition has no field to auto-set. Contains zero gs.eventQueue() calls per the email-disabled constraint and zero hardcoded sys_id reference literals.</description> <internal_name>x_casemgmt_validate_open_transition</internal_name> <label_cache>Validate Open Transition</label_cache> <latest_snapshot><![CDATA[{ "name": "x_casemgmt_validate_open_transition", "label": "Validate Open Transition", "type": "subflow", "description": "Validates the Draft -> Open transition. Requires assigned_group populated; throws 'Required field assigned_group is empty.' on failure (AAP Section 0.5.5). Single-field precondition gate with no role check and no side effect on success.", "scope": "x_casemgmt", "run_as": "caller", "category": "subflow", "inputs": [ { "id": "input_case_record", "name": "case_record", "label": "Case Record", "field_type": "reference", "reference_table": "x_casemgmt_case", "is_mandatory": true, "default_value": null, "description": "The x_casemgmt_case row whose Draft -> Open transition is being validated. Passed from the parent flow as $trigger.current. The Script Include reads caseGr.getValue('assigned_group') to determine whether the precondition holds. Reference table is bound BY NAME (x_casemgmt_case), not by sys_id, per AAP Section 0.7.2." } ], "outputs": [], "stages": [], "actions": [ { "id": "step_run_validator", "order": 100, "name": "Validate Open Transition (assigned_group populated check)", "type": "script_step", "description": "Calls x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToOpen(case_record). The Script Include returns { ok: true } when assigned_group is populated (non-empty, non-whitespace) or { ok: false, error: 'Required field assigned_group is empty.' } when assigned_group is null/empty/whitespace, or { ok: false, error: 'Case record is missing.' } when case_record itself is null/undefined (defensive guard). Internally the Script Include reads caseGr.getValue('assigned_group'), coerces to String, and trims whitespace before the empty-string check; this guards against the edge case of a single-space value being treated as populated. The script step exposes two outputs that the next If step inspects: ok (boolean) and error_message (string).", "script": "(function execute(inputs, outputs) { var validator = new x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator(); var result = validator.canTransitionToOpen(inputs.case_record); outputs.ok = !!(result && result.ok); outputs.error_message = (result && result.error) ? String(result.error) : ''; })(fd_data.subflow_inputs, fd_data._step_outputs);", "script_includes_used": [ "x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator" ], "tables_referenced": [ "x_casemgmt_case" ], "outputs": [ { "name": "ok", "label": "OK", "field_type": "boolean", "description": "True when the validator reports the transition is permitted (assigned_group populated). False when assigned_group is null/empty/whitespace or when the case_record input is null/undefined." }, { "name": "error_message", "label": "Error Message", "field_type": "string", "description": "Empty string when ok=true. The message 'Required field assigned_group is empty.' when ok=false because assigned_group is null/empty/whitespace. The defensive message 'Case record is missing.' when ok=false because of a null case_record (should not occur in normal parent-flow invocation since the parent flow always passes $trigger.current which is guaranteed by the platform to be a valid GlideRecord)." } ] }, { "id": "step_if_validator_failed", "order": 200, "name": "If validator returned not-ok", "type": "if", "description": "Branches when the validator's ok output is false. The branch executes the Throw Error action that surfaces the validator's error message on the form and aborts the parent flow's triggering update transaction. When ok is true, the if-branch is skipped and the subflow returns successfully with no further action.", "condition": "fd_data._step_outputs.step_run_validator.ok == false", "actions": [ { "id": "step_throw_error", "order": 100, "name": "Throw Error (surface validator's message on form)", "type": "throw_error", "description": "Throws the validator's error message to abort the parent flow's update and surface the message on the form. Flow Designer Throw Error implicitly invokes gs.addErrorMessage(message) and setAbortAction(true) on the triggering GlideRecord transaction. The message is bound to the Script Step's error_message output, which the Script Include sets to 'Required field assigned_group is empty.' for the empty-assigned_group failure mode (the canonical AAP Section 0.5.5 Draft -> Open precondition violation). The error message text is preserved character-for-character from the Script Include return value; this Throw Error step does not compose its own message. Per AAP Section 0.7.1, surfacing the blocking error on the form is non-negotiable - silent failures or post-save error logs are unacceptable.", "inputs": { "message": "${step_run_validator.error_message}", "default_failure_message": "Required field assigned_group is empty." } } ] } ] }]]></latest_snapshot> <latest_snapshot_user display_value="System Administrator">admin</latest_snapshot_user> <master_snapshot><![CDATA[{ "name": "x_casemgmt_validate_open_transition", "label": "Validate Open Transition", "type": "subflow", "description": "Validates the Draft -> Open transition. Requires assigned_group populated; throws 'Required field assigned_group is empty.' on failure (AAP Section 0.5.5). Single-field precondition gate with no role check and no side effect on success.", "scope": "x_casemgmt", "run_as": "caller", "category": "subflow", "inputs": [ { "id": "input_case_record", "name": "case_record", "label": "Case Record", "field_type": "reference", "reference_table": "x_casemgmt_case", "is_mandatory": true, "default_value": null, "description": "The x_casemgmt_case row whose Draft -> Open transition is being validated. Passed from the parent flow as $trigger.current. The Script Include reads caseGr.getValue('assigned_group') to determine whether the precondition holds. Reference table is bound BY NAME (x_casemgmt_case), not by sys_id, per AAP Section 0.7.2." } ], "outputs": [], "stages": [], "actions": [ { "id": "step_run_validator", "order": 100, "name": "Validate Open Transition (assigned_group populated check)", "type": "script_step", "description": "Calls x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToOpen(case_record). The Script Include returns { ok: true } when assigned_group is populated (non-empty, non-whitespace) or { ok: false, error: 'Required field assigned_group is empty.' } when assigned_group is null/empty/whitespace, or { ok: false, error: 'Case record is missing.' } when case_record itself is null/undefined (defensive guard). Internally the Script Include reads caseGr.getValue('assigned_group'), coerces to String, and trims whitespace before the empty-string check; this guards against the edge case of a single-space value being treated as populated. The script step exposes two outputs that the next If step inspects: ok (boolean) and error_message (string).", "script": "(function execute(inputs, outputs) { var validator = new x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator(); var result = validator.canTransitionToOpen(inputs.case_record); outputs.ok = !!(result && result.ok); outputs.error_message = (result && result.error) ? String(result.error) : ''; })(fd_data.subflow_inputs, fd_data._step_outputs);", "script_includes_used": [ "x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator" ], "tables_referenced": [ "x_casemgmt_case" ], "outputs": [ { "name": "ok", "label": "OK", "field_type": "boolean", "description": "True when the validator reports the transition is permitted (assigned_group populated). False when assigned_group is null/empty/whitespace or when the case_record input is null/undefined." }, { "name": "error_message", "label": "Error Message", "field_type": "string", "description": "Empty string when ok=true. The message 'Required field assigned_group is empty.' when ok=false because assigned_group is null/empty/whitespace. The defensive message 'Case record is missing.' when ok=false because of a null case_record (should not occur in normal parent-flow invocation since the parent flow always passes $trigger.current which is guaranteed by the platform to be a valid GlideRecord)." } ] }, { "id": "step_if_validator_failed", "order": 200, "name": "If validator returned not-ok", "type": "if", "description": "Branches when the validator's ok output is false. The branch executes the Throw Error action that surfaces the validator's error message on the form and aborts the parent flow's triggering update transaction. When ok is true, the if-branch is skipped and the subflow returns successfully with no further action.", "condition": "fd_data._step_outputs.step_run_validator.ok == false", "actions": [ { "id": "step_throw_error", "order": 100, "name": "Throw Error (surface validator's message on form)", "type": "throw_error", "description": "Throws the validator's error message to abort the parent flow's update and surface the message on the form. Flow Designer Throw Error implicitly invokes gs.addErrorMessage(message) and setAbortAction(true) on the triggering GlideRecord transaction. The message is bound to the Script Step's error_message output, which the Script Include sets to 'Required field assigned_group is empty.' for the empty-assigned_group failure mode (the canonical AAP Section 0.5.5 Draft -> Open precondition violation). The error message text is preserved character-for-character from the Script Include return value; this Throw Error step does not compose its own message. Per AAP Section 0.7.1, surfacing the blocking error on the form is non-negotiable - silent failures or post-save error logs are unacceptable.", "inputs": { "message": "${step_run_validator.error_message}", "default_failure_message": "Required field assigned_group is empty." } } ] } ] }]]></master_snapshot> <master_snapshot_id/> <name>x_casemgmt_validate_open_transition</name> <natlang/> <nlu_model_version/> <outputs/> <protection_policy/> <remote_published_version/> <run_as>caller</run_as> <sc_callable>false</sc_callable> <show_draft_actions>false</show_draft_actions> <show_triggered_flows>false</show_triggered_flows> <status>published</status> <sys_class_name>sys_hub_flow</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>968df74ca78c07ed1dd3ea6c755963d0</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>x_casemgmt_validate_open_transition</sys_name> <sys_overrides/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_hub_flow_x_casemgmt_validate_open_transition</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <type>subflow</type> <validation_status>complete</validation_status> </sys_hub_flow> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Validate In Progress Transition
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_hub_flow"> <sys_hub_flow action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <access>public</access> <acls/> <active>true</active> <annotation/> <callable_by_client_api>false</callable_by_client_api> <category display_value="Custom">custom</category> <copied_from/> <copied_from_name/> <description>Subflow that validates the (Open|Pending) -> In Progress transitions on x_casemgmt_case. Per AAP Section 0.5.5, both Open -> In Progress AND Pending -> In Progress reuse this single subflow because their precondition is identical: assigned_agent populated AND member of assigned_group. Calls x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToInProgress(case_record), which delegates to isAgentInGroup(userSysId, groupSysId) for the membership check via GlideRecord('sys_user_grmember'). On failure, throws the uniform validator error message "Assigned agent must be set and must be a member of the assigned group." (which the validator returns for all three failure modes: empty assigned_agent, empty assigned_group, agent not in group). Throw Error in Flow Designer surfaces the message on the form via gs.addErrorMessage + setAbortAction. Defense-in-depth complement to ../../business_rules/x_casemgmt_validate_assigned_agent_membership.xml (which fires on every save; this subflow fires only on transitions to In Progress). Called by parent flows ../general_inquiry_state_machine.xml and ../complaint_state_machine.xml whenever a case status changes to 'In Progress'. Inputs: case_record (Reference to x_casemgmt_case, mandatory, $trigger.current). No outputs at subflow level. No role check. No side effect on success - unlike validate_pending_transition (sets pending_reason) or validate_closed_transition (sets closed_date), the In Progress transition has no field to auto-set; the companion BR x_casemgmt_clear_pending_reason_on_inprogress.xml clears pending_reason on the Pending -> In Progress edge. Contains zero gs.eventQueue() calls per the email-disabled constraint and zero hardcoded sys_id reference literals.</description> <internal_name>x_casemgmt_validate_inprogress_transition</internal_name> <label_cache>Validate In Progress Transition</label_cache> <latest_snapshot><![CDATA[{ "name": "x_casemgmt_validate_inprogress_transition", "label": "Validate In Progress Transition", "type": "subflow", "description": "Validates the (Open|Pending) -> In Progress transition. Requires assigned_agent populated AND member of assigned_group; throws uniform error 'Assigned agent must be set and must be a member of the assigned group.' on failure (AAP Section 0.5.5). Reused for both Open -> In Progress and Pending -> In Progress because the precondition is identical.", "scope": "x_casemgmt", "run_as": "caller", "category": "subflow", "inputs": [ { "id": "input_case_record", "name": "case_record", "label": "Case Record", "field_type": "reference", "reference_table": "x_casemgmt_case", "is_mandatory": true, "default_value": null, "description": "The x_casemgmt_case row whose In Progress-transition is being validated. Passed from the parent flow as $trigger.current. The Script Include uses caseGr.getValue('assigned_agent') and caseGr.getValue('assigned_group') to read the runtime sys_ids and queries sys_user_grmember for the membership check." } ], "outputs": [], "stages": [], "actions": [ { "id": "step_run_validator", "order": 100, "name": "Validate In Progress Transition (assigned_agent + group membership check)", "type": "script_step", "description": "Calls x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToInProgress(case_record). The Script Include returns { ok: true } when assigned_agent is populated AND assigned_group is populated AND the agent is a member of the group, or { ok: false, error: 'Assigned agent must be set and must be a member of the assigned group.' } for all three failure modes (empty assigned_agent, empty assigned_group, agent not in group). The uniform error message is intentional: a probing client cannot distinguish which precondition failed (defense against privilege-escalation reconnaissance). Internally the Script Include reads caseGr.getValue('assigned_agent') and caseGr.getValue('assigned_group') for the field values, then calls isAgentInGroup which queries sys_user_grmember via GlideRecord with addQuery('user', userSysId) and addQuery('group', groupSysId).", "script": "(function execute(inputs, outputs) { var validator = new x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator(); var result = validator.canTransitionToInProgress(inputs.case_record); outputs.ok = !!(result && result.ok); outputs.error_message = (result && result.error) ? String(result.error) : ''; })(fd_data.subflow_inputs, fd_data._step_outputs);", "script_includes_used": [ "x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator" ], "tables_referenced": [ "x_casemgmt_case", "sys_user_grmember" ], "outputs": [ { "name": "ok", "label": "OK", "field_type": "boolean", "description": "True when the validator reports the transition is permitted (assigned_agent set, assigned_group set, agent is member of group). False when any precondition fails or when the case_record input is null/undefined." }, { "name": "error_message", "label": "Error Message", "field_type": "string", "description": "Empty string when ok=true. The uniform message 'Assigned agent must be set and must be a member of the assigned group.' when ok=false because of any precondition failure (empty assigned_agent, empty assigned_group, or agent not in group). The defensive message 'Case record is missing.' when ok=false because of a null case_record (should not occur in normal parent-flow invocation)." } ] }, { "id": "step_if_validator_failed", "order": 200, "name": "If validator returned not-ok", "type": "if", "description": "Branches when the validator's ok output is false. The branch executes the Throw Error action that surfaces the validator's error message on the form and aborts the parent flow's triggering update transaction.", "condition": "fd_data._step_outputs.step_run_validator.ok == false", "actions": [ { "id": "step_throw_error", "order": 100, "name": "Throw Error (surface validator's message on form)", "type": "throw_error", "description": "Throws the validator's error message to abort the parent flow's update and surface the message on the form. Flow Designer Throw Error implicitly invokes gs.addErrorMessage(message) and setAbortAction(true) on the triggering GlideRecord transaction. The message is bound to the Script Step's error_message output, which the Script Include sets to the uniform AAP-aligned string 'Assigned agent must be set and must be a member of the assigned group.' for any precondition failure. The error message text is preserved character-for-character from the Script Include return value; this Throw Error step does not compose its own message.", "inputs": { "message": "${step_run_validator.error_message}", "uniform_failure_message": "Assigned agent must be set and must be a member of the assigned group." } } ] } ] }]]></latest_snapshot> <latest_snapshot_user display_value="System Administrator">admin</latest_snapshot_user> <master_snapshot><![CDATA[{ "name": "x_casemgmt_validate_inprogress_transition", "label": "Validate In Progress Transition", "type": "subflow", "description": "Validates the (Open|Pending) -> In Progress transition. Requires assigned_agent populated AND member of assigned_group; throws uniform error 'Assigned agent must be set and must be a member of the assigned group.' on failure (AAP Section 0.5.5). Reused for both Open -> In Progress and Pending -> In Progress because the precondition is identical.", "scope": "x_casemgmt", "run_as": "caller", "category": "subflow", "inputs": [ { "id": "input_case_record", "name": "case_record", "label": "Case Record", "field_type": "reference", "reference_table": "x_casemgmt_case", "is_mandatory": true, "default_value": null, "description": "The x_casemgmt_case row whose In Progress-transition is being validated. Passed from the parent flow as $trigger.current. The Script Include uses caseGr.getValue('assigned_agent') and caseGr.getValue('assigned_group') to read the runtime sys_ids and queries sys_user_grmember for the membership check." } ], "outputs": [], "stages": [], "actions": [ { "id": "step_run_validator", "order": 100, "name": "Validate In Progress Transition (assigned_agent + group membership check)", "type": "script_step", "description": "Calls x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToInProgress(case_record). The Script Include returns { ok: true } when assigned_agent is populated AND assigned_group is populated AND the agent is a member of the group, or { ok: false, error: 'Assigned agent must be set and must be a member of the assigned group.' } for all three failure modes (empty assigned_agent, empty assigned_group, agent not in group). The uniform error message is intentional: a probing client cannot distinguish which precondition failed (defense against privilege-escalation reconnaissance). Internally the Script Include reads caseGr.getValue('assigned_agent') and caseGr.getValue('assigned_group') for the field values, then calls isAgentInGroup which queries sys_user_grmember via GlideRecord with addQuery('user', userSysId) and addQuery('group', groupSysId).", "script": "(function execute(inputs, outputs) { var validator = new x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator(); var result = validator.canTransitionToInProgress(inputs.case_record); outputs.ok = !!(result && result.ok); outputs.error_message = (result && result.error) ? String(result.error) : ''; })(fd_data.subflow_inputs, fd_data._step_outputs);", "script_includes_used": [ "x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator" ], "tables_referenced": [ "x_casemgmt_case", "sys_user_grmember" ], "outputs": [ { "name": "ok", "label": "OK", "field_type": "boolean", "description": "True when the validator reports the transition is permitted (assigned_agent set, assigned_group set, agent is member of group). False when any precondition fails or when the case_record input is null/undefined." }, { "name": "error_message", "label": "Error Message", "field_type": "string", "description": "Empty string when ok=true. The uniform message 'Assigned agent must be set and must be a member of the assigned group.' when ok=false because of any precondition failure (empty assigned_agent, empty assigned_group, or agent not in group). The defensive message 'Case record is missing.' when ok=false because of a null case_record (should not occur in normal parent-flow invocation)." } ] }, { "id": "step_if_validator_failed", "order": 200, "name": "If validator returned not-ok", "type": "if", "description": "Branches when the validator's ok output is false. The branch executes the Throw Error action that surfaces the validator's error message on the form and aborts the parent flow's triggering update transaction.", "condition": "fd_data._step_outputs.step_run_validator.ok == false", "actions": [ { "id": "step_throw_error", "order": 100, "name": "Throw Error (surface validator's message on form)", "type": "throw_error", "description": "Throws the validator's error message to abort the parent flow's update and surface the message on the form. Flow Designer Throw Error implicitly invokes gs.addErrorMessage(message) and setAbortAction(true) on the triggering GlideRecord transaction. The message is bound to the Script Step's error_message output, which the Script Include sets to the uniform AAP-aligned string 'Assigned agent must be set and must be a member of the assigned group.' for any precondition failure. The error message text is preserved character-for-character from the Script Include return value; this Throw Error step does not compose its own message.", "inputs": { "message": "${step_run_validator.error_message}", "uniform_failure_message": "Assigned agent must be set and must be a member of the assigned group." } } ] } ] }]]></master_snapshot> <master_snapshot_id/> <name>x_casemgmt_validate_inprogress_transition</name> <natlang/> <nlu_model_version/> <outputs/> <protection_policy/> <remote_published_version/> <run_as>caller</run_as> <sc_callable>false</sc_callable> <show_draft_actions>false</show_draft_actions> <show_triggered_flows>false</show_triggered_flows> <status>published</status> <sys_class_name>sys_hub_flow</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>f8117474ee1542c4e6aacd477fdef910</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>x_casemgmt_validate_inprogress_transition</sys_name> <sys_overrides/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_hub_flow_x_casemgmt_validate_inprogress_transition</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <type>subflow</type> <validation_status>complete</validation_status> </sys_hub_flow> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Validate Pending Transition
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_hub_flow"> <sys_hub_flow action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <access>public</access> <acls/> <active>true</active> <annotation/> <callable_by_client_api>false</callable_by_client_api> <category display_value="Custom">custom</category> <copied_from/> <copied_from_name/> <description>Subflow that validates the In Progress -> Pending transition on x_casemgmt_case. Per AAP Section 0.5.5, this transition has NO required condition; its only side effect is to stamp pending_reason on the case (Awaiting Info / Awaiting Third Party / Other). Defaults pending_reason to 'Other' when caller does not supply a value. Called by parent flows ../general_inquiry_state_machine.xml and ../complaint_state_machine.xml whenever a case status changes to 'Pending'. Replaces no specific code in ArkCase ChangeCaseFileStateService.changeCaseState() because ArkCase had no Pending sub-state with a typed reason; this subflow is target-side new behavior. Contains zero gs.eventQueue() calls per the email-disabled constraint and zero hardcoded sys_id reference literals. Inputs: case_record (Reference to x_casemgmt_case, mandatory) and pending_reason (Choice with values Awaiting Info / Awaiting Third Party / Other, optional, default 'Other'). No outputs, no Throw Error step, no Script Include call, no role check.</description> <internal_name>x_casemgmt_validate_pending_transition</internal_name> <label_cache>Validate Pending Transition</label_cache> <latest_snapshot><![CDATA[{ "name": "x_casemgmt_validate_pending_transition", "label": "Validate Pending Transition", "type": "subflow", "description": "Stamps pending_reason on the case row when status transitions to Pending. No required condition (AAP Section 0.5.5).", "scope": "x_casemgmt", "run_as": "caller", "category": "subflow", "inputs": [ { "id": "input_case_record", "name": "case_record", "label": "Case Record", "field_type": "reference", "reference_table": "x_casemgmt_case", "is_mandatory": true, "default_value": null, "description": "The x_casemgmt_case row whose pending_reason will be stamped. Passed from the parent flow as $trigger.current." }, { "id": "input_pending_reason", "name": "pending_reason", "label": "Pending Reason", "field_type": "choice", "choice_list": [ { "value": "Awaiting Info", "label": "Awaiting Info" }, { "value": "Awaiting Third Party", "label": "Awaiting Third Party" }, { "value": "Other", "label": "Other" } ], "is_mandatory": false, "default_value": "Other", "description": "Reason the case is moving to Pending status. One of the three choice values from sys_choice_case_pending_reason. Defaults to 'Other' when not provided by the parent flow." } ], "outputs": [], "stages": [], "actions": [ { "id": "step_default_pending_reason", "order": 100, "name": "Default pending_reason if empty", "type": "set_flow_variable", "description": "If the caller did not supply a pending_reason value, default it to 'Other' so the case row is never left with an empty pending_reason after a Pending transition.", "inputs": { "variable_name": "pending_reason", "expression": "fd_data.subflow_inputs.pending_reason || 'Other'" } }, { "id": "step_update_case_pending_reason", "order": 200, "name": "Set pending_reason on case", "type": "update_record", "description": "Updates the case_record's pending_reason field with the supplied (or defaulted) Choice value. This is the subflow's sole side effect.", "inputs": { "table": "x_casemgmt_case", "record": "${inputs.case_record}", "fields": [ { "field_name": "pending_reason", "value": "${inputs.pending_reason}" } ] } } ] }]]></latest_snapshot> <latest_snapshot_user display_value="System Administrator">admin</latest_snapshot_user> <master_snapshot><![CDATA[{ "name": "x_casemgmt_validate_pending_transition", "label": "Validate Pending Transition", "type": "subflow", "description": "Stamps pending_reason on the case row when status transitions to Pending. No required condition (AAP Section 0.5.5).", "scope": "x_casemgmt", "run_as": "caller", "category": "subflow", "inputs": [ { "id": "input_case_record", "name": "case_record", "label": "Case Record", "field_type": "reference", "reference_table": "x_casemgmt_case", "is_mandatory": true, "default_value": null, "description": "The x_casemgmt_case row whose pending_reason will be stamped. Passed from the parent flow as $trigger.current." }, { "id": "input_pending_reason", "name": "pending_reason", "label": "Pending Reason", "field_type": "choice", "choice_list": [ { "value": "Awaiting Info", "label": "Awaiting Info" }, { "value": "Awaiting Third Party", "label": "Awaiting Third Party" }, { "value": "Other", "label": "Other" } ], "is_mandatory": false, "default_value": "Other", "description": "Reason the case is moving to Pending status. One of the three choice values from sys_choice_case_pending_reason. Defaults to 'Other' when not provided by the parent flow." } ], "outputs": [], "stages": [], "actions": [ { "id": "step_default_pending_reason", "order": 100, "name": "Default pending_reason if empty", "type": "set_flow_variable", "description": "If the caller did not supply a pending_reason value, default it to 'Other' so the case row is never left with an empty pending_reason after a Pending transition.", "inputs": { "variable_name": "pending_reason", "expression": "fd_data.subflow_inputs.pending_reason || 'Other'" } }, { "id": "step_update_case_pending_reason", "order": 200, "name": "Set pending_reason on case", "type": "update_record", "description": "Updates the case_record's pending_reason field with the supplied (or defaulted) Choice value. This is the subflow's sole side effect.", "inputs": { "table": "x_casemgmt_case", "record": "${inputs.case_record}", "fields": [ { "field_name": "pending_reason", "value": "${inputs.pending_reason}" } ] } } ] }]]></master_snapshot> <master_snapshot_id/> <name>x_casemgmt_validate_pending_transition</name> <natlang/> <nlu_model_version/> <outputs/> <protection_policy/> <remote_published_version/> <run_as>caller</run_as> <sc_callable>false</sc_callable> <show_draft_actions>false</show_draft_actions> <show_triggered_flows>false</show_triggered_flows> <status>published</status> <sys_class_name>sys_hub_flow</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>94063d7d535c4e841ad7deb0b45e8ba5</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>x_casemgmt_validate_pending_transition</sys_name> <sys_overrides/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_hub_flow_x_casemgmt_validate_pending_transition</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <type>subflow</type> <validation_status>complete</validation_status> </sys_hub_flow> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Validate Resolved Transition
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_hub_flow"> <sys_hub_flow action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <access>public</access> <acls/> <active>true</active> <annotation/> <callable_by_client_api>false</callable_by_client_api> <category display_value="Custom">custom</category> <copied_from/> <copied_from_name/> <description>Subflow that validates the In Progress -> Resolved transition on x_casemgmt_case. Per AAP Section 0.5.5, requires all linked x_casemgmt_case_task records to have status=Closed; calls x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToResolved(case_record), which delegates to getOpenTaskCountForCase via GlideAggregate. On failure, throws the VERBATIM AAP Section 0.7.4 error message "All tasks must be closed before resolving this case." which surfaces on the form via Flow Designer Throw Error (gs.addErrorMessage + setAbortAction). ServiceNow-native replacement for ArkCase CaseFileTasksService (which used Solr search; the target uses GlideAggregate for SQL COUNT(*) - Solr is out of POC scope per AAP Section 0.3.2). Called by parent flows ../general_inquiry_state_machine.xml and ../complaint_state_machine.xml whenever a case status changes to 'Resolved'. Inputs: case_record (Reference to x_casemgmt_case, mandatory, $trigger.current). No outputs at subflow level. No role check. No side effect on success - unlike validate_pending_transition (sets pending_reason) or validate_closed_transition (sets closed_date), the Resolved transition has no field to auto-set. Contains zero gs.eventQueue() calls per the email-disabled constraint and zero hardcoded sys_id reference literals.</description> <internal_name>x_casemgmt_validate_resolved_transition</internal_name> <label_cache>Validate Resolved Transition</label_cache> <latest_snapshot><![CDATA[{ "name": "x_casemgmt_validate_resolved_transition", "label": "Validate Resolved Transition", "type": "subflow", "description": "Validates the In Progress -> Resolved transition. Requires all linked x_casemgmt_case_task records to have status=Closed; throws verbatim AAP Section 0.7.4 error 'All tasks must be closed before resolving this case.' on failure (AAP Section 0.5.5).", "scope": "x_casemgmt", "run_as": "caller", "category": "subflow", "inputs": [ { "id": "input_case_record", "name": "case_record", "label": "Case Record", "field_type": "reference", "reference_table": "x_casemgmt_case", "is_mandatory": true, "default_value": null, "description": "The x_casemgmt_case row whose Resolved-transition is being validated. Passed from the parent flow as $trigger.current. The Script Include uses caseGr.getUniqueValue() to obtain the case sys_id and queries x_casemgmt_case_task children via GlideAggregate." } ], "outputs": [], "stages": [], "actions": [ { "id": "step_run_validator", "order": 100, "name": "Validate Resolved Transition (all tasks closed check)", "type": "script_step", "description": "Calls x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToResolved(case_record). The Script Include returns { ok: true } when zero open tasks remain, or { ok: false, error: 'All tasks must be closed before resolving this case.' } when at least one child task has status != 'Closed' (the verbatim AAP Section 0.7.4 message). Internally the Script Include uses GlideAggregate('x_casemgmt_case_task') with addQuery('case', caseSysId) and addQuery('status', '!=', 'Closed') for an efficient SQL COUNT(*) check.", "script": "(function execute(inputs, outputs) { var validator = new x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator(); var result = validator.canTransitionToResolved(inputs.case_record); outputs.ok = !!(result && result.ok); outputs.error_message = (result && result.error) ? String(result.error) : ''; })(fd_data.subflow_inputs, fd_data._step_outputs);", "script_includes_used": [ "x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator" ], "tables_referenced": [ "x_casemgmt_case_task" ], "outputs": [ { "name": "ok", "label": "OK", "field_type": "boolean", "description": "True when the validator reports the transition is permitted (zero open tasks remain). False when at least one child task has status != 'Closed' or when the case_record input is null/undefined." }, { "name": "error_message", "label": "Error Message", "field_type": "string", "description": "Empty string when ok=true. The verbatim AAP Section 0.7.4 message 'All tasks must be closed before resolving this case.' when ok=false because of open tasks. The defensive message 'Case record is missing.' when ok=false because of a null case_record (should not occur in normal parent-flow invocation)." } ] }, { "id": "step_if_validator_failed", "order": 200, "name": "If validator returned not-ok", "type": "if", "description": "Branches when the validator's ok output is false. The branch executes the Throw Error action that surfaces the verbatim AAP Section 0.7.4 message on the form and aborts the parent flow's triggering update transaction.", "condition": "fd_data._step_outputs.step_run_validator.ok == false", "actions": [ { "id": "step_throw_error", "order": 100, "name": "Throw Error (surface verbatim AAP message)", "type": "throw_error", "description": "Throws the verbatim AAP Section 0.7.4 error message 'All tasks must be closed before resolving this case.' to abort the parent flow's update and surface the message on the form. Flow Designer Throw Error implicitly invokes gs.addErrorMessage(message) and setAbortAction(true) on the triggering GlideRecord transaction. The message is bound to the Script Step's error_message output, which the Script Include sets to the verbatim AAP string when openCount > 0. The literal verbatim string 'All tasks must be closed before resolving this case.' is preserved character-for-character including trailing period and lowercase 'case' per AAP Section 0.7.4 and assigned-folder Rule 9.", "inputs": { "message": "${step_run_validator.error_message}", "verbatim_aap_0_7_4_message": "All tasks must be closed before resolving this case." } } ] } ] }]]></latest_snapshot> <latest_snapshot_user display_value="System Administrator">admin</latest_snapshot_user> <master_snapshot><![CDATA[{ "name": "x_casemgmt_validate_resolved_transition", "label": "Validate Resolved Transition", "type": "subflow", "description": "Validates the In Progress -> Resolved transition. Requires all linked x_casemgmt_case_task records to have status=Closed; throws verbatim AAP Section 0.7.4 error 'All tasks must be closed before resolving this case.' on failure (AAP Section 0.5.5).", "scope": "x_casemgmt", "run_as": "caller", "category": "subflow", "inputs": [ { "id": "input_case_record", "name": "case_record", "label": "Case Record", "field_type": "reference", "reference_table": "x_casemgmt_case", "is_mandatory": true, "default_value": null, "description": "The x_casemgmt_case row whose Resolved-transition is being validated. Passed from the parent flow as $trigger.current. The Script Include uses caseGr.getUniqueValue() to obtain the case sys_id and queries x_casemgmt_case_task children via GlideAggregate." } ], "outputs": [], "stages": [], "actions": [ { "id": "step_run_validator", "order": 100, "name": "Validate Resolved Transition (all tasks closed check)", "type": "script_step", "description": "Calls x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToResolved(case_record). The Script Include returns { ok: true } when zero open tasks remain, or { ok: false, error: 'All tasks must be closed before resolving this case.' } when at least one child task has status != 'Closed' (the verbatim AAP Section 0.7.4 message). Internally the Script Include uses GlideAggregate('x_casemgmt_case_task') with addQuery('case', caseSysId) and addQuery('status', '!=', 'Closed') for an efficient SQL COUNT(*) check.", "script": "(function execute(inputs, outputs) { var validator = new x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator(); var result = validator.canTransitionToResolved(inputs.case_record); outputs.ok = !!(result && result.ok); outputs.error_message = (result && result.error) ? String(result.error) : ''; })(fd_data.subflow_inputs, fd_data._step_outputs);", "script_includes_used": [ "x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator" ], "tables_referenced": [ "x_casemgmt_case_task" ], "outputs": [ { "name": "ok", "label": "OK", "field_type": "boolean", "description": "True when the validator reports the transition is permitted (zero open tasks remain). False when at least one child task has status != 'Closed' or when the case_record input is null/undefined." }, { "name": "error_message", "label": "Error Message", "field_type": "string", "description": "Empty string when ok=true. The verbatim AAP Section 0.7.4 message 'All tasks must be closed before resolving this case.' when ok=false because of open tasks. The defensive message 'Case record is missing.' when ok=false because of a null case_record (should not occur in normal parent-flow invocation)." } ] }, { "id": "step_if_validator_failed", "order": 200, "name": "If validator returned not-ok", "type": "if", "description": "Branches when the validator's ok output is false. The branch executes the Throw Error action that surfaces the verbatim AAP Section 0.7.4 message on the form and aborts the parent flow's triggering update transaction.", "condition": "fd_data._step_outputs.step_run_validator.ok == false", "actions": [ { "id": "step_throw_error", "order": 100, "name": "Throw Error (surface verbatim AAP message)", "type": "throw_error", "description": "Throws the verbatim AAP Section 0.7.4 error message 'All tasks must be closed before resolving this case.' to abort the parent flow's update and surface the message on the form. Flow Designer Throw Error implicitly invokes gs.addErrorMessage(message) and setAbortAction(true) on the triggering GlideRecord transaction. The message is bound to the Script Step's error_message output, which the Script Include sets to the verbatim AAP string when openCount > 0. The literal verbatim string 'All tasks must be closed before resolving this case.' is preserved character-for-character including trailing period and lowercase 'case' per AAP Section 0.7.4 and assigned-folder Rule 9.", "inputs": { "message": "${step_run_validator.error_message}", "verbatim_aap_0_7_4_message": "All tasks must be closed before resolving this case." } } ] } ] }]]></master_snapshot> <master_snapshot_id/> <name>x_casemgmt_validate_resolved_transition</name> <natlang/> <nlu_model_version/> <outputs/> <protection_policy/> <remote_published_version/> <run_as>caller</run_as> <sc_callable>false</sc_callable> <show_draft_actions>false</show_draft_actions> <show_triggered_flows>false</show_triggered_flows> <status>published</status> <sys_class_name>sys_hub_flow</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>c8fde9d4675c53e1c14e40c0503835f0</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>x_casemgmt_validate_resolved_transition</sys_name> <sys_overrides/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_hub_flow_x_casemgmt_validate_resolved_transition</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <type>subflow</type> <validation_status>complete</validation_status> </sys_hub_flow> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: Validate Closed Transition
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_hub_flow"> <sys_hub_flow action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <access>public</access> <acls/> <active>true</active> <annotation/> <callable_by_client_api>false</callable_by_client_api> <category display_value="Custom">custom</category> <copied_from/> <copied_from_name/> <description>Subflow that validates the Resolved -> Closed transition on x_casemgmt_case. Per AAP Section 0.5.5, requires the caller to have the x_casemgmt_case_manager role; calls x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToClosed(case_record, gs.getUserID()) which delegates to gs.getUser().hasRole('x_casemgmt_case_manager'). On failure, throws the validator's error message "Only case managers can close cases." which surfaces on the form via Flow Designer Throw Error (gs.addErrorMessage + setAbortAction). On success, sets closed_date = gs.nowDateTime() on the case via an Update Record step (the AAP Section 0.5.5 mandated side effect of the Resolved -> Closed transition; defense-in-depth with ../../business_rules/x_casemgmt_set_closed_date.xml). Called by parent flows ../general_inquiry_state_machine.xml and ../complaint_state_machine.xml whenever a case status changes to 'Closed'. Inputs: case_record (Reference to x_casemgmt_case, mandatory, $trigger.current). No outputs at subflow level. ServiceNow-native replacement for ArkCase ChangeCaseFileStateService.changeCaseState's "if (CLOSED.equals(newState)) retval.setClosed(now)" branch (lines 97-100), strengthened with an explicit case_manager role gate that ArkCase did not have. Contains zero gs.eventQueue() calls per the email-disabled constraint and zero hardcoded sys_id reference literals.</description> <internal_name>x_casemgmt_validate_closed_transition</internal_name> <label_cache>Validate Closed Transition</label_cache> <latest_snapshot><![CDATA[{ "name": "x_casemgmt_validate_closed_transition", "label": "Validate Closed Transition", "type": "subflow", "description": "Validates the Resolved -> Closed transition. Requires caller to have x_casemgmt_case_manager role; throws 'Only case managers can close cases.' on failure (AAP Section 0.5.5). On success, sets closed_date = gs.nowDateTime() on the case row.", "scope": "x_casemgmt", "run_as": "caller", "category": "subflow", "inputs": [ { "id": "input_case_record", "name": "case_record", "label": "Case Record", "field_type": "reference", "reference_table": "x_casemgmt_case", "is_mandatory": true, "default_value": null, "description": "The x_casemgmt_case row whose Closed-transition is being validated. Passed from the parent flow as $trigger.current. The Script Include validates the saving user has the case_manager role; on success, the Update Record step sets closed_date on this record." } ], "outputs": [], "stages": [], "actions": [ { "id": "step_run_validator", "order": 100, "name": "Validate Closed Transition (manager role check)", "type": "script_step", "description": "Calls x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToClosed(case_record, gs.getUserID()). The Script Include returns { ok: true } when the user has the x_casemgmt_case_manager role, or { ok: false, error: 'Only case managers can close cases.' } when the role check fails. Also captures gs.nowDateTime() as closed_date_now for the subsequent Update Record step (Step 3). Passing gs.getUserID() explicitly ensures the role check evaluates against the saving user (defensive; matches the validator's signature).", "script": "(function execute(inputs, outputs) { var validator = new x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator(); var result = validator.canTransitionToClosed(inputs.case_record, gs.getUserID()); outputs.ok = !!(result && result.ok); outputs.error_message = (result && result.error) ? String(result.error) : ''; outputs.closed_date_now = gs.nowDateTime() + ''; })(fd_data.subflow_inputs, fd_data._step_outputs);", "script_includes_used": [ "x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator" ], "tables_referenced": [], "outputs": [ { "name": "ok", "label": "OK", "field_type": "boolean", "description": "True when the validator reports the saving user has the x_casemgmt_case_manager role. False when the role check fails or when the case_record input is null/undefined." }, { "name": "error_message", "label": "Error Message", "field_type": "string", "description": "Empty string when ok=true. The Script Include's default message 'Only case managers can close cases.' when ok=false because of a missing case_manager role. The defensive message 'Case record is missing.' when ok=false because of a null case_record (should not occur in normal parent-flow invocation)." }, { "name": "closed_date_now", "label": "Closed Date Now", "field_type": "string", "description": "Current GlideDateTime in system timezone, captured at the moment the validator was called. Bound to the Update Record step's closed_date field via ${step_run_validator.closed_date_now}. Equivalent to ArkCase ChangeCaseFileStateService line 93's 'Date now = new Date()' followed by line 99's retval.setClosed(now)." } ] }, { "id": "step_if_validator_failed", "order": 200, "name": "If validator returned not-ok", "type": "if", "description": "Branches when the validator's ok output is false. The branch executes the Throw Error action that surfaces the validator's error message on the form and aborts the parent flow's triggering update transaction.", "condition": "fd_data._step_outputs.step_run_validator.ok == false", "actions": [ { "id": "step_throw_error", "order": 100, "name": "Throw Error (surface validator message)", "type": "throw_error", "description": "Throws the validator's error message to abort the parent flow's update and surface the message on the form. Flow Designer Throw Error implicitly invokes gs.addErrorMessage(message) and setAbortAction(true) on the triggering GlideRecord transaction. The message is bound to the Script Step's error_message output, which the Script Include sets to 'Only case managers can close cases.' when the role check fails. The default message 'Only case managers can close cases.' is preserved character-for-character including trailing period and lowercase 'managers' / 'cases' per the Script Include's canonical message.", "inputs": { "message": "${step_run_validator.error_message}", "default_validator_message": "Only case managers can close cases." } } ] }, { "id": "step_update_closed_date", "order": 300, "name": "Set closed_date to now (success path)", "type": "update_record", "description": "On the success path (validator ok=true and Throw Error did not fire), updates the case_record's closed_date field to gs.nowDateTime() captured by Step 1's closed_date_now output. This is the AAP Section 0.5.5 mandated side effect of the Resolved -> Closed transition. The companion business rule ../../business_rules/x_casemgmt_set_closed_date.xml provides defense-in-depth (sets the same field at the BR layer with the same gs.nowDateTime() expression). ServiceNow-native equivalent of ArkCase ChangeCaseFileStateService line 99: retval.setClosed(now).", "condition": "fd_data._step_outputs.step_run_validator.ok == true", "inputs": { "table": "x_casemgmt_case", "record": "${inputs.case_record}", "fields": [ { "field_name": "closed_date", "value": "${step_run_validator.closed_date_now}" } ] } } ] }]]></latest_snapshot> <latest_snapshot_user display_value="System Administrator">admin</latest_snapshot_user> <master_snapshot><![CDATA[{ "name": "x_casemgmt_validate_closed_transition", "label": "Validate Closed Transition", "type": "subflow", "description": "Validates the Resolved -> Closed transition. Requires caller to have x_casemgmt_case_manager role; throws 'Only case managers can close cases.' on failure (AAP Section 0.5.5). On success, sets closed_date = gs.nowDateTime() on the case row.", "scope": "x_casemgmt", "run_as": "caller", "category": "subflow", "inputs": [ { "id": "input_case_record", "name": "case_record", "label": "Case Record", "field_type": "reference", "reference_table": "x_casemgmt_case", "is_mandatory": true, "default_value": null, "description": "The x_casemgmt_case row whose Closed-transition is being validated. Passed from the parent flow as $trigger.current. The Script Include validates the saving user has the case_manager role; on success, the Update Record step sets closed_date on this record." } ], "outputs": [], "stages": [], "actions": [ { "id": "step_run_validator", "order": 100, "name": "Validate Closed Transition (manager role check)", "type": "script_step", "description": "Calls x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToClosed(case_record, gs.getUserID()). The Script Include returns { ok: true } when the user has the x_casemgmt_case_manager role, or { ok: false, error: 'Only case managers can close cases.' } when the role check fails. Also captures gs.nowDateTime() as closed_date_now for the subsequent Update Record step (Step 3). Passing gs.getUserID() explicitly ensures the role check evaluates against the saving user (defensive; matches the validator's signature).", "script": "(function execute(inputs, outputs) { var validator = new x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator(); var result = validator.canTransitionToClosed(inputs.case_record, gs.getUserID()); outputs.ok = !!(result && result.ok); outputs.error_message = (result && result.error) ? String(result.error) : ''; outputs.closed_date_now = gs.nowDateTime() + ''; })(fd_data.subflow_inputs, fd_data._step_outputs);", "script_includes_used": [ "x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator" ], "tables_referenced": [], "outputs": [ { "name": "ok", "label": "OK", "field_type": "boolean", "description": "True when the validator reports the saving user has the x_casemgmt_case_manager role. False when the role check fails or when the case_record input is null/undefined." }, { "name": "error_message", "label": "Error Message", "field_type": "string", "description": "Empty string when ok=true. The Script Include's default message 'Only case managers can close cases.' when ok=false because of a missing case_manager role. The defensive message 'Case record is missing.' when ok=false because of a null case_record (should not occur in normal parent-flow invocation)." }, { "name": "closed_date_now", "label": "Closed Date Now", "field_type": "string", "description": "Current GlideDateTime in system timezone, captured at the moment the validator was called. Bound to the Update Record step's closed_date field via ${step_run_validator.closed_date_now}. Equivalent to ArkCase ChangeCaseFileStateService line 93's 'Date now = new Date()' followed by line 99's retval.setClosed(now)." } ] }, { "id": "step_if_validator_failed", "order": 200, "name": "If validator returned not-ok", "type": "if", "description": "Branches when the validator's ok output is false. The branch executes the Throw Error action that surfaces the validator's error message on the form and aborts the parent flow's triggering update transaction.", "condition": "fd_data._step_outputs.step_run_validator.ok == false", "actions": [ { "id": "step_throw_error", "order": 100, "name": "Throw Error (surface validator message)", "type": "throw_error", "description": "Throws the validator's error message to abort the parent flow's update and surface the message on the form. Flow Designer Throw Error implicitly invokes gs.addErrorMessage(message) and setAbortAction(true) on the triggering GlideRecord transaction. The message is bound to the Script Step's error_message output, which the Script Include sets to 'Only case managers can close cases.' when the role check fails. The default message 'Only case managers can close cases.' is preserved character-for-character including trailing period and lowercase 'managers' / 'cases' per the Script Include's canonical message.", "inputs": { "message": "${step_run_validator.error_message}", "default_validator_message": "Only case managers can close cases." } } ] }, { "id": "step_update_closed_date", "order": 300, "name": "Set closed_date to now (success path)", "type": "update_record", "description": "On the success path (validator ok=true and Throw Error did not fire), updates the case_record's closed_date field to gs.nowDateTime() captured by Step 1's closed_date_now output. This is the AAP Section 0.5.5 mandated side effect of the Resolved -> Closed transition. The companion business rule ../../business_rules/x_casemgmt_set_closed_date.xml provides defense-in-depth (sets the same field at the BR layer with the same gs.nowDateTime() expression). ServiceNow-native equivalent of ArkCase ChangeCaseFileStateService line 99: retval.setClosed(now).", "condition": "fd_data._step_outputs.step_run_validator.ok == true", "inputs": { "table": "x_casemgmt_case", "record": "${inputs.case_record}", "fields": [ { "field_name": "closed_date", "value": "${step_run_validator.closed_date_now}" } ] } } ] }]]></master_snapshot> <master_snapshot_id/> <name>x_casemgmt_validate_closed_transition</name> <natlang/> <nlu_model_version/> <outputs/> <protection_policy/> <remote_published_version/> <run_as>caller</run_as> <sc_callable>false</sc_callable> <show_draft_actions>false</show_draft_actions> <show_triggered_flows>false</show_triggered_flows> <status>published</status> <sys_class_name>sys_hub_flow</sys_class_name> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_created_on> <sys_id>61c7e698df95ea6fc80f639b4dc99fb3</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_name>x_casemgmt_validate_closed_transition</sys_name> <sys_overrides/> <sys_package display_value="Case Management" source="x_casemgmt">x_casemgmt</sys_package> <sys_policy/> <sys_scope display_value="Case Management">x_casemgmt</sys_scope> <sys_update_name>sys_hub_flow_x_casemgmt_validate_closed_transition</sys_update_name> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2025-01-01 00:00:00</sys_updated_on> <type>subflow</type> <validation_status>complete</validation_status> </sys_hub_flow> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: General Inquiry State Machine
sys_update_xml.payload: <record_update table="sys_hub_flow"> <sys_hub_flow action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <access>public</access> <acls/> <active>true</active> <annotation/> <callable_by_client_api>false</callable_by_client_api> <category display_value="Custom">custom</category> <copied_from/> <copied_from_name/> <description>Parent Flow Designer flow that orchestrates every status transition for cases of type General Inquiry on x_casemgmt_case. OnUpdate trigger filtered on type=General Inquiry AND status change. Dispatches to validate_open_transition, validate_inprogress_transition, validate_pending_transition, validate_resolved_transition, or validate_closed_transition subflow under ./sub_flows/ based on the new status value via a 5-branch If/Else-If ladder. Replaces the ArkCase ChangeCaseFileStateService + ChangeCaseStatusWorkflowListener + CaseFileQueueHandler stack (the BPMN/Activiti engine is eliminated entirely per AAP Section 0.1.2). Runs as user_who_triggers so that the role-based gate in validate_closed_transition (gs.getUser().hasRole('x_casemgmt_case_manager')) evaluates against the saving user rather than the system user - non-negotiable per AAP Section 0.7.4. All transition rules and verbatim error messages are sourced from AAP Sections 0.5.5 and 0.7.4 and surfaced from the dispatched subflows or supporting business rules (../business_rules/x_casemgmt_block_draft_backtransition.xml and ../business_rules/x_casemgmt_block_terminal_closed.xml). NO hardcoded sys_ids in any reference field - the trigger's table reference, every subflow call, and every scope reference resolve by name (table=x_casemgmt_case, subflow_name=x_casemgmt_validate_*_transition, scope=x_casemgmt). Active=true and status=published per AAP Section 0.7.3 Gate 7 so Update Set commit immediately enables the state machine. Functionally identical to ./complaint_state_machine.xml except the trigger filter is type=General Inquiry rather than type=Complaint - the duplication is intentional per AAP Section 0.4.3 to keep per-type trigger filtering explicit and to allow future per-type customization. Contains zero gs.eventQueue() calls per the email-disabled constraint and zero hardcoded sys_id reference literals.</description> <internal_name>x_casemgmt_general_inquiry_state_machine</internal_name> <label_cache>General Inquiry State Machine</label_cache> <latest_snapshot><![CDATA[{ "name": "x_casemgmt_general_inquiry_state_machine", "label": "General Inquiry State Machine", "type": "flow", "description": "Parent state-machine flow for cases of type=General Inquiry. OnUpdate trigger filtered on type=General Inquiry AND status change; dispatches to one of five transition-validation subflows based on the new status value. Replaces ArkCase ChangeCaseFileStateService + ChangeCaseStatusWorkflowListener + CaseFileQueueHandler. Runs as user_who_triggers for correct role-check evaluation. Functionally identical to complaint_state_machine.xml except the trigger filter is type=General Inquiry rather than type=Complaint.", "scope": "x_casemgmt", "run_as": "user_who_triggers", "category": "flow", "trigger": { "id": "trigger_record_updated", "name": "On General Inquiry case status change", "type": "record", "operation": "updated", "trigger_type": "record_updated", "table": "x_casemgmt_case", "reference_table": "x_casemgmt_case", "condition": "type=General Inquiry^EQ", "condition_query": "type=General Inquiry", "filter_status_changes_only": true, "filter_field_changed": "status", "filter_field_changes_to_any": true, "run_trigger": "always", "description": "Fires on every update to a row in x_casemgmt_case where (a) the row's type field equals the literal string 'General Inquiry' (single ASCII space between words; this is the choice LABEL value declared in ../choices/sys_choice_case_type.xml sequence 100, NOT a sys_id) AND (b) the row's status field changed value as part of the update. The trigger does NOT fire on inserts, on row deletions, or on updates that leave status unchanged. The 'condition' string uses ServiceNow's GlideRecord encoded-query syntax: type=General Inquiry^EQ means 'type field exactly equals General Inquiry' (the ^EQ suffix is the equality operator marker - some platform releases serialize it as '=' alone, others append ^EQ). The filter_status_changes_only flag is the platform-canonical way to express 'fire only when the status field changes value' which is more selective than firing on every update." }, "inputs": [], "outputs": [], "stages": [], "actions": [ { "id": "step_if_status_open", "order": 100, "name": "If status is Open", "type": "if", "description": "Branches when the case's new status value is exactly 'Open' (Title Case, single word). On match, dispatches to the validate_open_transition subflow which validates that assigned_group is populated. The condition uses the new value of the field (current.status), not the previous value (previous.status), because the trigger has already established that status changed and we are interested in the destination state.", "condition": "current.status == 'Open'", "actions": [ { "id": "step_call_validate_open", "order": 100, "name": "Call x_casemgmt_validate_open_transition", "type": "call_subflow", "subflow_name": "x_casemgmt_validate_open_transition", "subflow_scope": "x_casemgmt", "description": "Invokes the validate_open_transition subflow which checks that assigned_group is populated before allowing Draft -> Open. The subflow uses x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToOpen and throws a blocking form-level error if the precondition fails. Subflow lookup is by NAME (not by sys_id) per AAP Section 0.7.2 No-Hardcoded-Sys_ID constraint.", "inputs": { "case_record": "${trigger.current}" } } ] }, { "id": "step_elseif_status_inprogress", "order": 200, "name": "Else if status is In Progress", "type": "elseif", "description": "Branches when the case's new status value is exactly 'In Progress' (Title Case, two words separated by single ASCII space). On match, dispatches to the validate_inprogress_transition subflow which validates that assigned_agent is populated AND is a member of assigned_group, and clears pending_reason if the source state was Pending.", "condition": "current.status == 'In Progress'", "actions": [ { "id": "step_call_validate_inprogress", "order": 100, "name": "Call x_casemgmt_validate_inprogress_transition", "type": "call_subflow", "subflow_name": "x_casemgmt_validate_inprogress_transition", "subflow_scope": "x_casemgmt", "description": "Invokes the validate_inprogress_transition subflow which checks that assigned_agent is populated AND is a member of assigned_group before allowing Open -> In Progress (or Pending -> In Progress). The subflow uses x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToInProgress and throws a blocking form-level error if the compound precondition fails. Subflow lookup is by NAME per AAP Section 0.7.2.", "inputs": { "case_record": "${trigger.current}" } } ] }, { "id": "step_elseif_status_pending", "order": 300, "name": "Else if status is Pending", "type": "elseif", "description": "Branches when the case's new status value is exactly 'Pending'. On match, dispatches to the validate_pending_transition subflow which has no precondition gate but DOES set the pending_reason field (Awaiting Info / Awaiting Third Party / Other) per AAP Section 0.5.5.", "condition": "current.status == 'Pending'", "actions": [ { "id": "step_call_validate_pending", "order": 100, "name": "Call x_casemgmt_validate_pending_transition", "type": "call_subflow", "subflow_name": "x_casemgmt_validate_pending_transition", "subflow_scope": "x_casemgmt", "description": "Invokes the validate_pending_transition subflow which stamps pending_reason on the case row. No precondition gate; the In Progress -> Pending transition is unconditionally allowed per AAP Section 0.5.5. The pending_reason value is captured from the calling user's prompt input and persisted via Update Record action inside the subflow. Subflow lookup is by NAME per AAP Section 0.7.2.", "inputs": { "case_record": "${trigger.current}" } } ] }, { "id": "step_elseif_status_resolved", "order": 400, "name": "Else if status is Resolved", "type": "elseif", "description": "Branches when the case's new status value is exactly 'Resolved'. On match, dispatches to the validate_resolved_transition subflow which queries child x_casemgmt_case_task records via GlideAggregate and surfaces the VERBATIM AAP Section 0.7.4 error message 'All tasks must be closed before resolving this case.' if any open child tasks exist.", "condition": "current.status == 'Resolved'", "actions": [ { "id": "step_call_validate_resolved", "order": 100, "name": "Call x_casemgmt_validate_resolved_transition", "type": "call_subflow", "subflow_name": "x_casemgmt_validate_resolved_transition", "subflow_scope": "x_casemgmt", "description": "Invokes the validate_resolved_transition subflow which enforces the all-tasks-closed gate before allowing In Progress -> Resolved. The subflow uses x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator.canTransitionToResolved (which delegates to GlideAggregate('x_casemgmt_case_task') with addQuery('case', caseSysId) and addQuery('status', '!=', 'Closed')). Throws the VERBATIM AAP Section 0.7.4 error message on failure. Replaces ArkCase CaseFileTasksService (which used Solr search; Solr is out of POC scope per AAP Section 0.3.2). Subflow lookup is by NAME per AAP Section 0.7.2.", "inputs": { "case_record": "${trigger.current}" } } ] }, { "id": "step_elseif_status_closed", "order": 500, "name": "Else if status is Closed", "type": "elseif", "description": "Branches when the case's new status value is exactly 'Closed'. On match, dispatches to the validate_closed_transition subflow which enforces the case_manager role gate before allowing Resolved -> Closed and auto-sets the closed_date field.", "condition": "current.status == 'Closed'", "actions": [ { "id": "step_call_validate_closed", "order": 100, "name": "Call x_casemgmt_validate_closed_transition", "type": "call_subflow", "subflow_name": "x_casemgmt_validate_closed_transition", "subflow_scope": "x_casemgmt", "description": "Invokes the validate_closed_transition subflow which (a) checks gs.getUser().hasRole('x_casemgmt_case_manager') and (b) auto-sets closed_date = gs.nowDateTime() per AAP Section 0.5.5. The role check evaluates against the saving user because this parent flow's run_as is user_who_triggers (NOT system_user, which would bypass the role gate). Subflow lookup is by NAME and the role lookup inside the subflow is also by NAME (x_casemgmt_case_manager) per AAP Section 0.7.2.", "inputs": { "case_record": "${trigger.current}" } } ] } ], "tables_referenced": [ "x_casemgmt_case", "x_casemgmt_case_task" ], "subflows_called": [ "x_casemgmt_validate_open_transition", "x_casemgmt_validate_inprogress_transition", "x_casemgmt_validate_pending_transition", "x_casemgmt_validate_resolved_transition", "x_casemgmt_validate_closed_transition" ], "script_includes_used": [ "x_casemgmt.CaseTransitionValidator" ] }]]></latest_snapshot> <latest_snapshot_user display_value="System Administrator">admin</latest_snapshot_user> <master_snapshot><![CDATA[{ "name": "x_casemgmt_general_inquiry_state_machine", "label": "General Inquiry State Machine", "type": "flow", "description": "Parent state-machine flow for cases of type=General Inquiry. OnUpdate trigger filtered on type=General Inquiry AND status change; dispatches to one of five transition-validation subflows based on the new status value. Replaces ArkCase ChangeCaseFileStateService + ChangeCaseStatusWorkflowListener + CaseFileQueueHandler. Runs as user_who_triggers for correct role-check evaluation. Functionally identical to complaint_state_machine.xml except the trigger filter is type=General Inquiry rather than type=Complaint.", "scope": "x_casemgmt", "run_as": "user_who_triggers", "category": "flow", "trigger": { "id": "trigger_record_updated", "name": "On General Inquiry case status change", "type": "record", "operation": "updated", "trigger_type": "record_updated", "table": "x_casemgmt_case", "reference_table": "x_casemgmt_case", "condition": "type=General Inquiry^EQ", "condition_query": "type=General Inquiry", "filter_status_changes_only": true, "filter_field_changed": "status", "filter_field_changes_to_any": true, "run_trigger": "always", "description": "Fires on every update to a row in x_casemgmt_case where (a) the row's type field equals the literal string 'General Inquiry' (single ASCII space between words; this is the choice LABEL value declared in ../choices/sys_choice_case_type.xml sequence 100, NOT a sys_id) AND (b) the row's status field changed value as part of the update. The trigger does NOT fire on inserts, on row deletions, or on updates that leave status unchanged.
